## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Clarify and GrowthX for organic growth strategy and content creation at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive AI-powered content creation and optimization service, combining strategy, execution, and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Clarify seeks to improve their content strategy, moving away from low-quality scaled SEO to high-quality, audience-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves an initial 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing growth execution (starting at $15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [The service includes content creation, optimization, fact-checking, and various content types beyond just blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

## Topics

### Clarify's Current Content Strategy

  - [Joined Clarify in February as marketing lead, helping with GTM motion](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [GA'd in June, announced funding, opened self-serve product](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [Founder brand: Interviews with Patrick and Austin, long-form blog posts, LinkedIn content](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [Scaled SEO: Exported keywords, used ByWord tool to generate hundreds of articles](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Issues with scaled SEO:](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [Drove non-branded traffic but produced low-quality, "garbage" content](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Negative perception when discovered by users](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [AI-powered content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Strategy sprints: 2-3 month engagement to set context and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Process includes:](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Ingesting client docs, understanding business context](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Creating "artifacts" for context engineering](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [Defining audience and quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Identifying opportunities and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Content OS platform:](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
      - [Automated workflows with expert review](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Research, fact-checking, and citation](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Various content types (articles, calculators, use case pages)](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Quality control:](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
      - [Managing editors and directors oversee content](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [Weekly client meetings for strategy and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Design and visuals:](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Automated image selection and generation](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [Infographics and illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
      - [Focus on post-publish enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Engagement Model and Pricing

  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint: $20K](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [Includes execution and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [Low-risk, can terminate if not satisfied](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution: Starting at $15K/month](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Flexible based on client needs and identified opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Currently 4-6 weeks out for kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send recording, create Slack channel, and provide simple proposal](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Kyle to share examples of blogs and content created by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Chris to review materials and examples](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting to discuss deeper areas if needed](https://fathom.video/share/zDyL45vem-SZZRA8ezhuSb6-FssjAARm?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
